Records.description: Four-loop HQET integral topology 4 for the matter-dependent cusp anomalous dimension at small angle. Defined via 16 propagators D_k with G(a1,...,a16) = e^{4 eps gamma_E} int prod D_k^{-a_k}, restricting a15=a16=0 and a10,a11,a12>=0. Contains 4 HQET (Wilson line) propagators linear in v.k_i and 7 standard massless quadratic propagators. Together with topology 5 and topologies 1-3 from arXiv:1708.01221, accounts for 46 master integrals for all n_f-dependent color structures. Three new MIs from topologies 4 and 5 are computed via Feynman parametrization and HyperInt, checked with FIESTA4.
Records.location: Eqs. (3.5)-(3.6), Section 3.3, restrictions in Eq. (3.7), topology shown in Figure 2
